pages.heading: Dear Annu ❤️
pages.contentTop:
Today is all about celebrating the you, but I want you to know that every day, I find a reason to celebrate you. You have brought so much happiness, warmth, and meaning into my life that it's hard to imagine what my days were like before you became a part of them. 
 I know today I am not able to celebrate this with you in person but trust me I am missing you to the moon and back. Soon we'll have a nice trip to some place where-ever you like. 
 I am sorry for being a little difficult person to deal with but all thanks to you for the way you are handling things.
pages.contentImgRight:
Remember this?? This is the day which changed my life and made it ten lakh thousand times better...
 Thank god that day you asked me out, varna meri himmat toh kabhi nai ho pati. But I think god has been grateful to me ki unhone meri life me tujhe bheja
pages.contentImgLeft: Woh ek din tha aur ye ek din hai, you are already a part of our family and it feels way too good to see how everyone loves you. (little jealous cause reyu loves you more). I m sure he'll definitely call you and wish you happy birthday cause I think he loves you more than me now
pages.contentBottom: With that said, I would like to wish you happy birthday once again. It took me long hrs to get this complete thing up and running cause its all custom written code. I hope you liked it. Will plan more and more surprises for you like this. Happy birthday!! I love youu ❤️
